checklist.prelaunch_check: Validate the F2 listing pack is the approved phase-1 configuration for NGN_VOL, KES_VOL, GHS_VOL, and ZAR_VOL with operational leverage at or below 2.0x.
checklist.runtime_monitor: Watch current_leverage_band, open_interest, and exposure_utilization every 60 seconds for drift outside the approved launch posture.
checklist.halt_procedure: If any instrument breaches approved launch posture or cap logic, force reduce-only through the restrictive emergency path and hold the market in HALTED or HALTED_LOCKDOWN.
checklist.reopen_procedure: Resume only through D3 staged reopening after the validated configuration has been restored and recovery checks remain green for the full stability window.

checklist.prelaunch_check: Confirm the governance registry is present, bounded, and restrictive-only for emergency operation.
checklist.runtime_monitor: Watch for any parameter activation outside published min or max bands and confirm immediate disclosure of any emergency action.
checklist.halt_procedure: If governance integrity fails, revert the affected parameter to last-good value and keep the affected market in the protective halt path.
checklist.reopen_procedure: Allow staged reopening only after the registry is revalidated, incident logging is complete, and no emergency override remains active beyond its expiry.

checklist.prelaunch_check: Confirm required public fields, cadences, and redaction boundaries are validated and the operator surface is reachable.
checklist.runtime_monitor: Watch market_status, funding_rate, current_leverage_band, volatility_metric, and risk_parameter_band for freshness and completeness every 60 seconds.
checklist.halt_procedure: If required transparency fields are stale or missing, block external launch and fall back to internal drill mode until publication integrity is restored.
checklist.reopen_procedure: Resume launch readiness only after contract validation passes and the operator surface is confirmed to be live-backed rather than mock-backed.

checklist.prelaunch_check: Confirm the deterministic 30% to 50% macro-shock scenarios still pass vault integrity, liquidity continuity, funding stabilization, transparency output, and governance stability checks.
checklist.runtime_monitor: Watch for live stress states or exposure-utilization patterns that resemble the validated 45% and 50% scenarios and confirm protective controls activate immediately.
checklist.halt_procedure: If live stress enters emergency state without the expected control reactions, halt the affected instrument and escalate to Market Controls Engineer.
checklist.reopen_procedure: Use the D3 staged path only after depth, source stability, and divergence recovery requirements stay green for the full window.

checklist.prelaunch_check: Confirm per-instrument vault isolation remains in force with no cross-margin or inter-vault borrowing enabled.
checklist.runtime_monitor: Watch incident scope and loss accounting to ensure losses remain instrument-local and unaffected markets remain operable.
checklist.halt_procedure: If any evidence of cross-instrument loss transfer appears, halt the affected scope immediately and treat it as a global launch blocker.
checklist.reopen_procedure: Do not reopen until the containment boundary is restored and a post-incident review proves local-only loss absorption.

checklist.prelaunch_check: Confirm the market-state dashboard is reachable and identify whether it is operating on live publication inputs or deterministic mock transparency data.
checklist.runtime_monitor: Watch the dashboard for state changes, freshness, and incident visibility during the launch window.
checklist.halt_procedure: If the operator surface is unavailable or mock-backed for a public launch, stop the release and continue only as an internal rehearsal.
checklist.reopen_procedure: Reconsider launch only after a fresh smoke test proves live-backed dashboard operation with the required public fields.

unresolved_risks.summary: Dashboard evidence available in the workspace is smoke-tested but explicitly uses deterministic mock transparency data rather than proven live publication inputs.
unresolved_risks.follow_up_action: Complete live data integration and rerun dashboard smoke plus snapshot validation before external launch.

unresolved_risks.summary: The launch package relies on design-time and deterministic validation artifacts rather than a live exchange rehearsal with real production telemetry.
unresolved_risks.follow_up_action: Run an internal shadow launch using live publication and control services before any public MVP release.
